Description: JSON-RPC 2.0 API endpoint for Umbraco — expose content as JSON-RPC with API key management and request logging. Supports Umbraco 13 (net8.0) and Umbraco 17 (net10.0).

AuthorDetails.Name: SplatDev
AuthorDetails.Description: SplatDev Ltda — building Umbraco plugins and tools for agencies and developers.
